title: Rajasthan JET 2026 Application Form

detail.title: Rajasthan JET 2026 Application Form
detail.short_info: Rajasthan JET 2026 Application Form started on 18 April 2026 and ends on 17 May 2026. Know complete details, including eligibility, application fee, exam pattern and official website for Agriculture admissions.

content.text: Rajasthan JET 2026 Application Form started on 18 April 2026. Candidates can fill the online application form till 17 May 2026 (without late fee) and 20 May 2026 (with late fee) on the official website. Rajasthan Joint Entrance Test (JET) 2026 is conducted by Swami Keshwanand Rajasthan Agricultural University, Bikaner (SKRAU) for admission to B.Sc. Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Food Technology, and other allied undergraduate courses in Rajasthan’s agricultural universities.

The notification also includes Pre-PG (M.Sc.) and Ph.D. entrance examinations on the same date. This is a golden opportunity for students seeking admission in agriculture and allied sciences in Rajasthan.
Direct Link to Open Rajasthan JET 2026 Notification: Click Here

rows: Swami Keshwanand Rajasthan Agricultural University, Bikaner (SKRAU)

content.text: Rajasthan Joint Entrance Test (JET) 2026 is the state-level entrance examination conducted for admission to undergraduate agriculture and allied courses in Rajasthan’s agricultural universities and affiliated colleges. The exam is scheduled for 21 June 2026.
The notification also covers Pre-PG (M.Sc.) and Ph.D. entrance examinations on the same date.

For Undergraduate JET (B.Sc. Agriculture & Allied Courses): Candidates must have passed 10+2 (Senior Secondary) with required subjects (Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics/Agriculture as per stream). Specific eligibility varies by course (Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Food Technology, etc.).

rows: B.Sc. (Hons.) Home Science / Community Science / Food Nutrition & Dietetics

sections.heading: How to Apply for Rajasthan JET 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official website www.jetskrau2026.com.
Click on the “Online Application” or “Register” link.
Fill the registration details and create login credentials.
Complete the application form with personal, academic, and contact details.
Upload required documents and scanned images.
Pay the application fee online.
Submit and download/print the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Rajasthan JET 2026 Application

items: 10th and 12th mark sheets and certificates
Category certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate
Scanned photograph and signature
Valid email ID and mobile number

seo_tags: Rajasthan JET 2026 Application Form: Last Date, Fees and How to Apply Online
